# CFO Bot ‚Äî Implementation Plan
**Generated by:** Antigravity Agent Manager  
**Based on:** SSOT v1.0.0  
**Date:** 2025-06-01

---

## Executive Summary

This Implementation Plan translates the System Specification into an ordered sequence of development tasks. It defines the file structure, component responsibilities, integration points, and deployment pipeline. All agents must reference this plan and the SSOT exclusively ‚Äî no ad-hoc decisions are permitted.

---

## 1. Repository Structure

```
cfo-bot/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ public/                          # Firebase Hosting root
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.html                   # Main SPA shell
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ css/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ style.css               # All styles (CSS variables, layout, components)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ js/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ main.js                 # App initialization, event wiring
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ chatEngine.js           # Message handling, API calls, state mgmt
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pricingEngine.js        # All pricing formulas (pure functions)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ intentParser.js         # Keyword-based intent detection
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ uiController.js         # DOM manipulation, rendering
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ assets/
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ logo.svg
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ docs/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ SYSTEM_SPECIFICATION.md     # SSOT (Phase 1)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md      # This document (Phase 2)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TEST_SPECIFICATIONS.md      # Test specs (Phase 2)
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ PRICING_STRATEGY.md        # Business strategy (Phase 4)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ firebase.json                   # Firebase Hosting config
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ .firebaserc                     # Firebase project config
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ README.md                       # Setup and deployment instructions
```

---

## 2. Component Architecture

### 2.1 `pricingEngine.js` ‚Äî Pure Pricing Functions

All functions are **pure** (no side effects, deterministic output).

```javascript
// Function signatures:
calculateCompute(tier, instanceCount, hoursPerDay, daysPerMonth) ‚Üí Number
calculateStorage(storageGB, readOps, writeOps, egressGB) ‚Üí Object{storage, ops, egress, total}
calculateDatabase(engine, tier, actualStorageGB) ‚Üí Number
calculateFirestore(reads, writes, deletes, storageGB) ‚Üí Number
calculateLLM(model, inputTokens, outputTokens) ‚Üí Number
calculateServerless(invocations, memoryMB, avgDurationSec) ‚Üí Number
calculateBandwidth(trafficGB) ‚Üí Number
calculateEgress(gb) ‚Üí Number  // shared by storage + bandwidth
```

### 2.2 `intentParser.js` ‚Äî Keyword Intent Detection

Scans user message for keywords and maps to intent IDs from SSOT Section 3.1.

```javascript
parseIntent(message) ‚Üí { intent: String, entities: Object }
```

Keyword map:
- `compute|server|vm|instance|cpu` ‚Üí `ESTIMATE_COMPUTE`
- `storage|bucket|s3|blob|object` ‚Üí `ESTIMATE_STORAGE`
- `database|db|postgres|mysql|firestore|sql` ‚Üí `ESTIMATE_DATABASE`
- `gpt|claude|gemini|llm|token|model|ai api` ‚Üí `ESTIMATE_LLM`
- `function|lambda|serverless|trigger` ‚Üí `ESTIMATE_SERVERLESS`
- `bandwidth|cdn|traffic|egress|transfer` ‚Üí `ESTIMATE_BANDWIDTH`
- `total|all|everything|full|summary` ‚Üí `ESTIMATE_TOTAL`
- `compare|cheapest|best model|vs` ‚Üí `COMPARE_MODELS`
- `reset|start over|clear|new` ‚Üí `RESET`

### 2.3 `chatEngine.js` ‚Äî Conversation State Machine

Manages:
- Session state (collected cost components)
- Message history array
- API call to Claude with system prompt
- Response parsing and cost extraction

State object:
```javascript
{
  messages: [],           // [{role, content, timestamp}]
  costComponents: {},     // {compute: 35.00, storage: 12.40, ...}
  totalCost: 0,
  sessionId: uuid
}
```

### 2.4 `uiController.js` ‚Äî Rendering Layer

- `renderMessage(role, content)` ‚Äî append chat bubble
- `updateCostPanel(components)` ‚Äî refresh sidebar cost cards
- `showTypingIndicator()` / `hideTypingIndicator()`
- `renderQuickChips()` ‚Äî preset question buttons
- `exportCostSummary()` ‚Äî JSON download

### 2.5 `main.js` ‚Äî Entry Point

- Initialize UI
- Attach event listeners (send button, Enter key, chip clicks)
- Bootstrap chat with welcome message

---

## 3. API Integration Specification

### 3.1 Request Structure

```javascript
POST https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages
Headers: {
  "Content-Type": "application/json",
  "x-api-key": process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY || window.ANTHROPIC_KEY,
  "anthropic-version": "2023-06-01"
}
Body: {
  model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  max_tokens: 1024,
  temperature: 0.1,
  system: SYSTEM_PROMPT,  // from SSOT Section 5
  messages: conversationHistory  // full history for context
}
```

### 3.2 Response Handling

```javascript
response.content[0].type === "text"
‚Üí Extract text, parse for cost figures using regex: /\$[\d,]+\.?\d*/g
‚Üí Update costComponents state
‚Üí Render in chat
```

### 3.3 Error States

| HTTP Code | Action |
|-----------|--------|
| 401 | Display "API key invalid" ‚Äî prompt re-entry |
| 429 | Display "Rate limit ‚Äî retry in 60s" |
| 500 | Display "Service unavailable ‚Äî try again" |
| Network error | Display "Connection failed ‚Äî check internet" |

---

## 4. Firebase Configuration

### 4.1 `firebase.json`
```json
{
  "hosting": {
    "public": "public",
    "ignore": ["firebase.json", "**/.*", "**/node_modules/**"],
    "rewrites": [
      { "source": "**", "destination": "/index.html" }
    ],
    "headers": [
      {
        "source": "**",
        "headers": [
          { "key": "X-Frame-Options", "value": "SAMEORIGIN" },
          { "key": "X-Content-Type-Options", "value": "nosniff" }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

### 4.2 Deployment Commands
```bash
npm install -g firebase-tools
firebase login
firebase init hosting
firebase deploy --only hosting
```

|---|------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | Write SSOT | Team | ‚Äî |
| 2 | Implement `pricingEngine.js` | Dev A | SSOT ¬ß2 |
| 3 | Write test specs | QA | SSOT ¬ß2 |
| 4 | Run pricing unit tests | Dev A | Tasks 2,3 |
| 5 | Implement `intentParser.js` | Dev B | SSOT ¬ß3 |
| 6 | Implement `chatEngine.js` | Dev B | Tasks 2,5 |
| 7 | Design HTML/CSS layout | Dev C | SSOT ¬ß6 |
| 8 | Implement `uiController.js` | Dev C | Task 7 |
| 9 | Implement `main.js` | Dev A | Tasks 6,8 |
| 10 | Integration testing | All | Task 9 |
| 11 | Firebase deploy | Dev A | Task 10 |
| 12 | Write pricing strategy doc | All | Task 11 |
